# DIG(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  dig — DNS lookup utility

## SYNOPSIS
  dig [type] <hostname>

## DESCRIPTION
Performs DNS lookups and returns domain resolution data including
A records, MX records, and TTL values.

## EXAMPLES
  dig nexus.corp
  dig MX nexuscorp.com
  dig @8.8.8.8 chimera-control

## SEE ALSO
  nslookup, whois, curl
